policy.placeholderDefinition: An artifact intended to be replaced before release

assets.provenance: Original project-specific living-aurora palette, shape, pattern, layout, typography, feedback, and motion tokens; contains no copied media
assets.integrationIntent: Canonical creative token input for DOM and Canvas appearance modes, procedural glyphs, range patterns, responsive hierarchy, focus, event feedback, and reduced-motion substitutions

assets.provenance: Original project-specific oscillator, envelope, deterministic-noise, throttling, and polyphony recipes; contains no samples or copied compositions
assets.integrationIntent: Optional muted-by-default Web Audio cue recipes emitted only after accepted canonical game events, with aggregation for high-frequency simulation events

assets.provenance: Original manifest authored for the approved Glimweave: Living Loom Creative handoff
assets.integrationIntent: Audit record for every Creative asset path, its provenance, license, placeholder status, and runtime intent
